title: Tempus AI acquires Personalis in $1.5bn precision oncology-focused deal
excerpt: Under the deal, Personalis’ minimal residual disease (MRD) test will be integrated into Tempus’ broader oncology portfolio.
content_html:
Tempus AI has agreed to acquire Personalis in a $1.5bn stock deal positioned to strengthen the company's oncology provision with minimal residual disease (MRD) testing.

Under the deal, expected to close by early 2027, Tempus will acquire the cancer-tech firm's outstanding stock at $16.25 per share, equating to a purchase price of $1.5bn, discounting Tempus' existing 12.25% stake in the California-based company. The mooted share price offering represents a 6% premium on Personalis' share price of $15.39 at market close on 17 July, while Tempus also has the option to exercise its right to pay up to 50% of the transaction in cash.

Following the deal's announcement ahead of market open on 20 July, Tempus' shares, listed on the Nasdaq, fell by 7.74% from a market open of $49.78 to a $48.41 close. Tempus has a market cap of $8.69bn. Meanwhile, Personalis stock, also listed on the Nasdaq, fell 13.2% to a market close of $13.34. Personalis has a market cap of $1.4bn.

In a research note, William Blair analysts said a pressure point will be profitability given Personalis' loss-making position, indicating a potential source of investor hesitation on the market. Tempus and Personalis have been collaborating since November 2023, a pair-up that saw the joint development and commercialisation of Personalis' NeXT Personal MRD test.

MRD testing, which is designed to detect trace amounts of cancer cells remaining in the body following cancer treatment such as chemotherapy, is attracting rising interest in the precision oncology space

Tempus CEO, Eric Lefkofsky, commented: "MRD is a large and rapidly growing market with the potential to truly transform how cancer patients are monitored, helping clinicians make faster and more informed decisions when cancer recurs.

"Through our existing collaboration with Personalis, we have already demonstrated the strength of combining highly sensitive MRD technology with our commercial infrastructure. With clinical adoption and reimbursement momentum building, we are collectively well positioned to capture this opportunity."

Personalis reported preliminary Q2 revenue of $22.4m, with 10,384 MRD tests distributed throughout the quarter, representing a 33% increase in test volumes on a quarter-over-quarter basis. However, the company is currently operating at a net loss.

Chris Hall, CEO of Personalis, commented: "Combining with Tempus gives us the scale, complementary capabilities and resources to accelerate innovation and deliver even greater value to patients, clinicians and biopharma partners."

sentences.zh: Personalis 首席执行官 Chris Hall 评论道：“与 Tempus 的合并为我们提供了规模、互补的能力和资源，以加速创新并为患者、临床医生和生物制药合作伙伴提供更大的价值。”

content_html_zh:
Tempus AI 已同意以 15 亿美元的股票交易收购 Personalis，旨在通过微小残留病 (MRD) 检测加强该公司的肿瘤学服务。

根据预计将于 2027 年初完成的交易，Tempus 将以每股 16.25 美元的价格收购这家癌症科技公司的已发行股票，相当于收购价格 15 亿美元，低于 Tempus 现有的这家加州公司 12.25% 的股份。 此次拟定的股价较 Personalis 7 月 17 日收盘价 15.39 美元溢价 6%，而 Tempus 还可以选择行使其权利，以现金支付最多 50% 的交易费用。

继该交易于 7 月 20 日开盘前宣布后，在纳斯达克上市的 Tempus 股价从开盘价 49.78 美元下跌至收盘价 48.41 美元，下跌 7.74%。 Tempus 的市值为 86.9 亿美元。 与此同时，同样在纳斯达克上市的 Personalis 股票下跌 13.2%，收于 13.34 美元。 Personalis 的市值为 14 亿美元。

威廉·布莱尔分析师在一份研究报告中表示，考虑到 Personalis 的亏损状况，盈利能力将是一个压力点，这表明投资者在市场上犹豫不决的潜在原因。 Tempus 和 Personalis 自 2023 年 11 月以来一直在合作，双方共同见证了 Personalis 的 NeXT Personal MRD 测试的联合开发和商业化。

MRD 检测旨在检测化疗等癌症治疗后体内残留的微量癌细胞，正引起人们对精准肿瘤学领域日益浓厚的兴趣

Tempus 首席执行官 Eric Lefkofsky 评论道：“MRD 是一个庞大且快速增长的市场，有潜力真正改变癌症患者的监测方式，帮助临床医生在癌症复发时做出更快、更明智的决策。

“通过我们与 Personalis 的现有合作，我们已经展示了将高度敏感的 MRD 技术与我们的商业基础设施相结合的实力。 随着临床采用和报销势头的增强，我们已经做好了充分准备来抓住这个机会。”

Personalis 报告第二季度初步收入为 2240 万美元，整个季度分发了 10,384 项 MRD 测试，测试量环比增长了 33%。 不过，该公司目前正处于净亏损状态。

Personalis 首席执行官 Chris Hall 评论道：“与 Tempus 的合并为我们提供了规模、互补的能力和资源，以加速创新并为患者、临床医生和生物制药合作伙伴提供更大的价值。”
